texto: Walter looked like he could chew nails and still come back for a helping of chain link fence. “Why can’t Romeo and Juliet meet in a garden like in Downton Abbey?” Romeo asked. “I mean who meets on a balcony? How real is that?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Suzanne M. Trauth: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Walter looked like he could chew nails and still come back for a helping of chain link fence. “Wh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, shakespeare, romeo pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
